name: Obsidian Sync
description: Obsidian vault sync status — sync runs via obsidian-headless CLI in a separate container (ob sync --continuous)

actions.name: sync
actions.description: Check sync status (sync runs continuously in obsidian-sync container)

actions.name: getStatus
actions.description: Get vault and sync container status

actions.name: getLastSyncTime
actions.description: Get timestamp of last successful sync check
